title: Randomized Algorithms, Approximation, and Honest Guarantees · Invariant Lens: Randomized Models
summary: Choose scalable methods when exact optimization is too expensive or adversarial. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa2 randomized models increment in a probabilistic and approximation guarantee report. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish Las Vegas and Monte Carlo guarantees, failure probability, and expected cost.
Reduce bipartite matching to flow and reconstruct matched stakeholder pairs.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
